channel.title: tmcw/awesome-geojson Weekly Updates RSS Feed
channel.description: Track daily updates of more than 500 awesome projects, including selfhosted, rust, javascript, swift, python, react, vue, free for dev, flutter, go etc.

item.title: tmcw/awesome-geojson Aug 1st - Aug 7th, 2022
item.description:
editors & viewers

  • img2geojson: digitize images by overlaying on a web map and drawing

item.title: tmcw/awesome-geojson Jun 6th - Jun 12th, 2022
item.description:
validation

  • Jest-GeoJSONstars5: an extended set of matcher functions for the Jest Javascript unit testing framework tailored to evaluating GeoJSON data

item.title: tmcw/awesome-geojson May 16th - May 22nd, 2022
item.description:
data

  • 99boundariesstars5: Generate any maritime & land boundary in GeoJSON and other file formats or download directly from the web

item.title: tmcw/awesome-geojson May 2nd - May 8th, 2022
item.description:
operations

  • turfstars7.4k: collection of functions for spatial operations and analysi
  • turf_dartstars27: a turf.js port for Dart and Flutter

item.title: tmcw/awesome-geojson Jan 3rd - Jan 9th, 2022
item.description:
operations

  • de9imstars22: collection of fast functions for spatial javascript operations

item.title: tmcw/awesome-geojson Oct 18th - Oct 24th, 2021
item.description:
validation

  • check-geojsonstars40: alternative to geojsonhint

item.title: tmcw/awesome-geojson Aug 30th - Sep 5th, 2021
item.description:
data

  • historical-basemapsstars274: Collection of georeferenced boundaries of world countries and cultural regions for use in mapping historical data on the world scale.

item.title: tmcw/awesome-geojson Jun 21st - Jun 27th, 2021
item.description:
validation

  • gjfstars91: A tool to fix invalid GeoJSON objects

    • serialization

  • geojson-serializerstars5: serialize Java with annotations as GeoJSON

item.title: tmcw/awesome-geojson Apr 13th - Apr 19th, 2020
item.description:
data

  • country-levelsstars16 Full planet GeoJSON extracts, based on ISO and FIPS codes.

item.title: tmcw/awesome-geojson Mar 16th - Mar 22nd, 2020
item.description:
editors & viewers

  • Web GIS: tools to view, inspect, and manipulate geospatial data

item.title: tmcw/awesome-geojson Apr 15th - Apr 21st, 2019
item.description:
validation

  • geojson-validation: many validation functions, plus simple gjv command line tool

item.title: tmcw/awesome-geojson Feb 25th - Mar 3rd, 2019
item.description:
conversion

  • togeojsonstars294: convert GPX & KML to geojson

item.title: tmcw/awesome-geojson Jan 28th - Feb 3rd, 2019
item.description:
operations

  • rfc7946-to-d3stars10: Converts polygon winding order between rfc7946 and d3 compatiblestars874 conventions.
  • geojsontoolsstars18: Python tools for manipulating GeoJSON files

    • conversion

  • CSV
    • csv2geojsonstars337: convert CSV to geojson
    • geojson2dsvstars8: convert geojson to CSV and TSV
  • vt-geojsonstars57: Extract GeoJSON from Mapbox vector tiles
  • tokmlstars164: convert GeoJSON to KML
  • wellknownstars237: convert WKT to GeoJSON
  • geoxformstars13: convert any size stream of geojson into a streaming CSV, Shapefile or KML, etc.
  • SVG
    • geojson2svgstars159: Converts GeoJSON to SVG string given SVG view port size and maps extent.
    • geojson-svgifystars14: Convert GeoJSON geometry paths to SVG polyline elements.
    • geojson-to-svg-clistars25: Command line tool to convert GeoJSON to SVG.
    • svg-to-geojsonstars105: Drag and drop SVG on the map and it returns GeoJSON back to you.
  • geojson2ndjson: convert GeoJSON to/from newline-delimited GeoJSON
  • geobuf: convert GeoJSON to/from GeoBuf
  • OpenStreetMap
    • osmtogeojsonstars576: convert OpenStreetMap data to GeoJSON
    • osm2geojsonstars11: converts OSM XML to GeoJSON
    • osm2geojsonstars63: (Python) converts OSM XML and Overpass XML/JSON to GeoJSON
    • minjurstars58: converts OpenStreetMap data to GeoJSON faster than anything else
    • geojsontoosmstars13: convert GeoJSON to OSM XML
    • geojson2osmstars6: convert GeoJSON to OSM XML
    • osm-and-geojsonstars88: convert GeoJSON to OSM XML and OSM XML to GeoJSON
    • geojson2osm-es6stars0: convert GeoJSON to OSM XML
    • query-overpassstars138 CLI to make Overpass query and transform result to GeoJSON. Based on osmtogeojsonstars576

item.title: tmcw/awesome-geojson Jan 21st - Jan 27th, 2019
item.description:
editors & viewers

  • geojson.tools: web-based editor from HERE XYZ

item.title: tmcw/awesome-geojson Oct 22nd - Oct 28th, 2018
item.description:
data

  • gimme OSM: Fetch geojson file by openstreetmap id

item.title: tmcw/awesome-geojson Apr 16th - Apr 22nd, 2018
item.description:
operations

  • geojson-id-streamingstars2: Add a unique id to each Feature
  • geojson-meshstars12: extract shared borders of Polygons in a GeoJSON
  • geojson-polygon-labelsstars73: generate point labels from GeoJSON polygons

item.title: tmcw/awesome-geojson Nov 20th - Nov 26th, 2017
item.description:
data

  • geo-mapsstars1.2k: High Quality GeoJSON maps programmatically generated.

item.title: tmcw/awesome-geojson Sep 25th - Oct 1st, 2017
item.description:
operations

  • geo_assignerstars2: Copy a property to all intersecting features

item.title: tmcw/awesome-geojson Sep 11th - Sep 17th, 2017
item.description:
operations

  • CoGranstars103: Resample statistics from one set of GeoJSON polygons to another

item.title: tmcw/awesome-geojson Mar 6th - Mar 12th, 2017
item.description:
editors & viewers

  • dropchop: browser-based GIS based on Turf.js

    • serialization

  • geojson-jacksonstars239: serialize GeoJSON to and from Java datatypes (based on Jackson)
  • mapbox-javastars374: serialize GeoJSON to and from Java datatypes (based on Gsonstars21.5k)

    • resources

  • RFC 7946 – The GeoJSON Format: the current GeoJSON standard by IETF
  • GeoJSON.org: the first specification, defining all the rules for GeoJSON structures

item.title: tmcw/awesome-geojson Feb 13th - Feb 19th, 2017
item.description:
conversion

  • superclusterstars1.5k: A fast GeoJSON clustering library for browsers and Node.

item.title: tmcw/awesome-geojson Feb 6th - Feb 12th, 2017
item.description:
services

  • featureserverstars94: An open source Esri-Style Feature Server

item.title: tmcw/awesome-geojson Jan 23rd - Jan 29th, 2017
item.description:
editors & viewers

  • geojson2imagestars11: library for generating images from GeoJSON

item.title: tmcw/awesome-geojson Dec 5th - Dec 11th, 2016
item.description:
operations

  • geojson-flattenstars49: flatten multi geometries into normal geometries
  • geojson-randomstars71: generate random geojson points, lines, and polygons

    • conversion

  • topojsonstars4.3k: convert GeoJSON to & from TopoJSON, join data from CSV

    • data

  • world-atlasstars925: customizable simplified versions of natural earth data
  • us-atlasstars791: geojson & topojson for United States features

    • editors & viewers

  • GeoJSON editor: a modified version of Google's simple geojson editor

item.title: tmcw/awesome-geojson Jul 18th - Jul 24th, 2016
item.description:
resources

  • More than you ever wanted to know about GeoJSON: a review of the concepts behind the specification in a more narrative format.

item.title: tmcw/awesome-geojson May 2nd - May 8th, 2016
item.description:
operations

  • geojson-multiplystars2: merge normal geojson features into one multi geometry type feature

item.title: tmcw/awesome-geojson Feb 22nd - Feb 28th, 2016
item.description:
operations

  • winnowstars89: run sql queries against geojson with javascript

item.title: tmcw/awesome-geojson Feb 15th - Feb 21st, 2016
item.description:
data

  • metro-extracts: regional OpenStreetMap data as GeoJSON

    • editors & viewers

  • gjvstars75: electron app enables viewing GeoJSON locally and hack on it with turf; works offline

item.title: tmcw/awesome-geojson Feb 1st - Feb 7th, 2016
item.description:
services

  • geojsonio-clistars152: send geojson features to geojson.io from your command line

    • data

  • geojson.xyz: natural earth data in web-friendly sizes with hotlinking

item.title: tmcw/awesome-geojson Jan 25th - Jan 31st, 2016
item.description:
serialization

  • rgeo-geojsonstars177: serialize geojson to/from ruby RGeo datatypes

item.title: tmcw/awesome-geojson Nov 30th - Dec 6th, 2015
item.description:
services

  • koop: Server with plugins that recast Esri, GitHub, Socrata and other services as GeoJSON endpoints

item.title: tmcw/awesome-geojson Oct 26th - Nov 1st, 2015
item.description:
conversion

  • gtfs2geojsonstars25: convert GTFS transit data to GeoJSON

item.title: tmcw/awesome-geojson Sep 21st - Sep 27th, 2015
item.description:
editors & viewers

  • mapstarter: helps generate svg, images, and code from GeoJSON
  • geojson.io: web-based editor, supports many filetype imports & exports, operations, sharing via GitHub
  • umap: web-based editor, supports sharing on-site

item.title: tmcw/awesome-geojson Jul 20th - Jul 26th, 2015
item.description:
conversion

  • esri2openstars248 converts proprietary Esri formats to GeoJSON

item.title: tmcw/awesome-geojson Jun 8th - Jun 14th, 2015
item.description:
data

  • strava-geojsonstars26: export all strava data to geojson, in node & on the web

item.title: tmcw/awesome-geojson Jun 1st - Jun 7th, 2015
item.description:
operations

  • geojson-joinstars34: join geojson against json, dbf, and csv files

    • services

  • mapshaper: Simple interface for simplification and conversion of GeoJSON and TopoJSON

item.title: tmcw/awesome-geojson May 25th - May 31st, 2015
item.description:
data

  • strava-to-geojsoniostars7: export runs & rides from Strava to GeoJSON
  • tgn-geojsonstars15: The Getty Thesaurus of Geographic Names (TGN) As GeoJSON.
  • whereonearth-airportstars13: outlines of every airport
  • whereonearth-buildingstars9: building outlines
  • whereonearth repos: other features output from GeoPlanet by Aaron Straup Cope
  • natural earth: country, province, and geographical data
  • openflights-geojsonstars25: openflights airports & airplane routes

    • operations

  • geojson-coordsstars27: Extract coordinates from GeoJSON
  • geojson-js-utilsstars397: JavaScript helper functions for manipulating GeoJSON
  • geojson-mergestars217: Merge multiple GeoJSON files into one FeatureCollection.
  • geojson-pick: remove all but specified properties from features in a geojson featurecollection
  • geojson-summarystars31: get a plain-english summary of what's in a geojson file
  • point-grouper: group geojson points into containing polygons
  • simplify-geojsonstars157: apply the ramer-douglas-peucker line simplification to geojson features or feature collections in JS or on the CLI
  • geojson-normalizestars30: normalize any geojson object into a geojson featurecollection
  • geojson-extent: compute the bounding box of geojson features
  • geojson-rewindstars106: enforce ring winding order

    • services

  • geojsonio-extensionstars1: chrome extension for editing github files in geojson.io
  • geojsonlint: REST interface for GeoJSON validation

    • conversion

  • geojson-mapnikifystars38: Transform GeoJSON objects into Mapnik XML stylesheets with embedded GeoJSON data and simplestyle-spec-derived styles.
  • geojson-vtstars1.6k: Slice GeoJSON into vector tiles on the fly in the browser
  • geojson2rtreestars9: generate a static rtree (using terraformer) from a set of geojson features
  • shp2json: convert shapefile zip archives to streaming GeoJSON
  • ogr2ogr: convert anything to anything
    • fionastars961: nice python interface on top of ogr

    • serialization

  • python-geojsonstars745: serialize geojson to/from python datatypes
  • rust-geojsonstars175: serialize geojson to/from rust datatypes

    • validation

  • geojsonhintstars244: find errors in your geojson files
